evidence.quote: we screened 28 ALS patients (21 FALS index patients and seven affected relatives) with a known FUS mutation
A prior screening for C9ORF72 had been unsuspicious in these patients

step_scores.label: fully_supported

evidence.quote: Whole-exome sequencing, read mapping, and variant calling were performed on HiSeq2000/2500 systems (Illumina)

issues.reason: Reference 11 in the paper is 'Freischmidt A... (2015)', not 'Brenner et al.'. Author name in citation is incorrect though ID [11] is locatable.

step_scores.fix_suggestion: Correct the citation author to 'Freischmidt et al., 2015' to match Reference 11 in the paper.

step_scores.label: mostly_supported
